description: Load the city-block.ng3 project from ~/Documents/Energy3D/, configure the environment location to Boston, MA, and set the date to June 21 (Summer Solstice). Then, enable the Solar Radiation Heat Map view so buildings show false-color solar intensity. Take a screenshot clearly showing the heat map, date, and location, and save it as ~/Documents/Energy3D/boston_summer_heatmap.png. Finally, save the modified project as a new file at ~/Documents/Energy3D/city-block-boston-summer.ng3.
